prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen 3 (CJXB)** 2.0L TSI engine, targeting 400 HP / 406 lb-ft on 93 octane with a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II** turbocharger, **APR High-Flow Carbon Fiber Intake**, and **APR Cast-Downpipe** with 3.5" diameter and 200-cell catalytic converter for optimized spool and emissions compliance

Full **034 Motorsport Motorsport Engine Mount Kit** (part #034-10-0001) with **034 Motorsport Transmission Mount Insert** (part #034-10-0002) and **034 Motorsport Pendulum Mount** (part #034-10-0003) to eliminate drivetrain deflection under 400+ lb-ft torque loads, paired with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** (organic/ceramic hybrid) for the **DQ250 6-speed DSG**

Custom **KW Suspension Clubsport Coilovers** (part #35231001) with **KW-specific valving for the MQB platform**, **034 Motorsport Front Sway Bar (25mm, adjustable)** (part #034-12-1001), **034 Motorsport Rear Sway Bar (22mm, adjustable)** (part #034-12-1002), and **H&R Super Sport Springs** (part #29132-2) for a 20mm front / 15mm rear drop, paired with **Whiteline Adjustable Endlinks** (part #KDT996) for precise roll center tuning
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 Widebody Kit** (specific to MQB Golf R) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter**, **Rocket Bunny GT-style side skirts**, and **Rocket Bunny GT rear diffuser**, all finished in **PPG Volkswagen Pure White (LA7W) with matte black accents** for OEM+ aggression

**OEM+ Euro-spec LED headlights** (part #5G1941007B) with **Lux H8 V4 Angel Eyes** and **Morimoto XB LED Fog Lights** (part #45160), paired with a **custom 3M Crystalline Series 90 tint (70% VLT front, 20% VLT rear) for heat rejection and privacy**

**Neuspeed RSE10 19x9.5 ET45 wheels** in **Gunmetal Finish** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect 265/30/19 tires**, paired with **AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front calipers (356mm rotors)** (part #CP9670-356RAC) and **AP Racing 4-piston rear calipers (330mm rotors)** (part #CP9450-330RAC) for track-ready stopping power, finished with **Motul RBF660 brake fluid**
